metadata.name: PDF Chat Assistant Evaluation Dataset
metadata.description: Structured evaluation tests measuring AI system quality, accuracy, and reliability

evaluation_cases.question: What is the project title?
Who is the author of the report?
What is the date of the report?
What is the version number?
What embedding model is used?
What vector store does the system use?
What database is used for data persistence?
What GUI framework is used?
What is the average response time?
What is the accuracy on factual questions?
What is the chunk size used?
What is the overlap between chunks?
Name one key feature mentioned in the report.
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: Any one of: PDF text extraction, text chunking, vector similarity search, local AI model integration, SQLite, desktop UI

evaluation_cases.question: What is one recommendation from the report?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: Any one of: Use larger models, add batch processing, implement export functionality, add support for additional formats

evaluation_cases.question: What is the main benefit of this system according to the conclusion?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: All processing happens on the user's machine, ensuring data privacy and sovereignty

evaluation_cases.question: Can you summarize what this report is about?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: A sample report about an AI-Powered Document Analysis System that provides test data

evaluation_cases.question: What is the capital of France?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: Should state that information is not available in the PDFs

evaluation_cases.question: Who won the 2022 World Cup?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: Should state that information is not available in the PDFs

evaluation_cases.question: What future improvements are suggested?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: Multi-language support and better PDF image extraction

evaluation_cases.question: What is the purpose of this document?
evaluation_cases.expected_answer: To provide test data for evaluating the PDF Chat Assistant application
